descriptions.description: The 91N6E Big Bird is a long-range panoramic surveillance radar system integrated into the S-400 Triumf air-defense complex. Developed by Almaz-Antey, this phased-array radar provides initial target acquisition and air-picture development over extended ranges. The 91N6E operates continuously to detect and classify airborne targets at all altitudes, feeding target data to the command post and engagement radars. Its panoramic search capability ensures persistent coverage across the defended sector, establishing the foundation for the layered air-defense architecture.
descriptions.shortDescription: Long-range panoramic surveillance radar for the S-400 air-defense system.

descriptions.description: The 91N6E uses a mechanically or electronically scanned phased-array antenna to provide 360-degree or sector panoramic coverage. The radar employs pulse-Doppler signal processing to detect moving targets against ground clutter and weather interference. The system integrates automatic target detection, tracking initiation, and track-maintenance algorithms to hand off tracks to the fire-control radar. Operating in conjunction with the 92N6E engagement radar, the 91N6E establishes target tracks that are automatically distributed across the integrated air-defense network. The radar's modular architecture permits rapid deployment and integration with command-and-control systems.
descriptions.shortDescription: Phased-array panoramic radar with pulse-Doppler processing for 360-degree coverage.
